focus_points.label: How he defines the next-level scope
focus_points.reason: What Ahmed means by “senior scope” and what success looks like in the next role, so the growth plan is anchored to concrete expectations rather than vague aspirations.

focus_points.label: Stakeholder trust and influence gaps
focus_points.reason: What stakeholder trust gaps he sees right now—could be visibility, expectations management, or hard-news conversations—and where he thinks he’s not yet landing at his level.

focus_points.label: Where he’s still acting as an executor
focus_points.reason: Whether Ahmed is temporarily pulled into tactical delivery due to pressure, or if there’s a confidence gap driving him to grab the work instead of moving it through others.

focus_points.label: Strategic ownership vs tactical firefighting
focus_points.reason: What he’s saying yes and no to over the next 6–12 weeks, so his growth plan ties to strategic ownership and measurable outcomes, not just good habits.
